result:
**Infrastructure Operations: 15 services (billing-worker, report-builder, session-manager, webhook-relay, search-indexer, cache-warmer, audit-logger, metrics-collector, ingest-api, user-profile-service, scheduler-core, payment-gateway, notification-daemon, export-pipeline, auth-service) across 6+ environments (dev, QA, green/blue, staging, canary, prod).**

**Recorded IDs:** Build CKSQBVDT, API PZD8GFFU, TLS 2H4389QQ, Incident GCDRHARC, License NHWWTGAJ, Deploy 7QXB2286, Dashboard Q4VQ3W6E, Rollback 9KF3F68C, Queue AR586HHA, Registry PRVCYV6V, Webhook S6ZD3FE2, DB AQ2MKQUS, Customer RX2R33X7, On-call YFNMHTU2, Cron S428ZGC5, Session 26V3GJFM.

**Recent activity:** Continuous ops including health checks, scaling, redeploying, rolling back, draining, patching, upgrading, reconfiguring. All services/environments touched. Outcomes: alerts cleared, error rates stabilized, memory pressure reduced, latency normalized, queue depth stable. Some operations required manual retries; some emitted warnings. No customer impact. Follow-up config cleanup and threshold review tasks filed. Logs archived. Documentation updated.
